case_title: C &C OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE VS WONG CHOW et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C &C OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG CHOW WONG YOKE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,786.31 INTEREST, $38.58 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,324.89, CREDIT OF $400.00 PER MEMO. 12/17/99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THESE TRANSACTIONS ARE BASED ON A RENEWED JUDGMENT THE DATES WERE ADJUSTED FOR COMPUTER PURPOSES TO ENABLE US TO ADJUDICATE TRANSACTIONS. SEE DOCKET

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C &C OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG CHOW WONG YOKE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.58 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,538.58, TERMS:$100/MO.BEGINS 8/30/91&ON THE 30TH DAY OF MO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON AUGUST 30,1991 AND ON THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED.
